items.name: Cardiovascular Risk Stratification
items.blurb: Framingham, SCORE2, and NZ cardiovascular risk assessment.

items.name: CHA2DS2-VASc
items.blurb: Stroke risk in atrial fibrillation and anticoagulation decision support.

items.name: Paediatric Dosage Calculator
items.blurb: Weight-based dosing for the everyday paediatric formulary.

items.name: Substance Risk Calculator
items.blurb: AUDIT, AUDIT-C, ASSIST and a few quick risk indices.

items.name: Antidepressant Weaning
items.blurb: Tapering schedules and withdrawal risk by agent.

items.name: Psychotropic Selector
items.blurb: Side-effect profile and safety comparison by class and indication.

items.name: Opioid Converter
items.blurb: Morphine-equivalent dose conversion across opioid therapies.

items.name: Steroid Equivalent Calculator
items.blurb: Glucocorticoid potency and dose comparison (prednisolone equivalent).

items.name: Prescriptions Outside NZ
items.blurb: Medicines prescribed overseas that are unavailable, unfunded, or differently restricted in NZ -- with local equivalents.

items.name: Anticholinergic Burden
items.blurb: Cumulative ACB score across a patient medication list, with STOPP flags and deprescribing guidance.

items.name: Geriatric Assessment Toolkit
items.blurb: FRAIL, Katz ADL, Lawton IADL, and Rockwood CFS for frailty and functional assessment.

items.name: COPD Management
items.blurb: GOLD-staged inhaler therapy with NZF-subsidised medicine options.

items.name: Due Date Estimator
items.blurb: Naegele rule and gestational age by LMP or ultrasound.

items.name: CTS-6 (Carpal Tunnel Score)
items.blurb: Kamath and Stothard six-item weighted score for CTS probability.
